briefdescription.para: No type specified.
Default player.
External player.
Enum for external player handle type.

detaileddescription.para: This enum identifies the type of player handle passed to VideoView. It is used when creating a VideoView with an externally managed player.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration for player event type.
Display isn't rotated. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Display is rotated 90 degree. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Display is rotated 180 degree. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Display is rotated 270 degree. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Video display rotation option @SINCE_1_1.38.

simplesect.para: The option is needed only for window surface rendering target

briefdescription.para: Codec which has higher priority as default. Platform selects it. Usually the H/W codec has higher priority than S/W codec if it exist.
H/W codec.
S/W codec.
Enumeration for video codec type.
Constructor. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Destructor. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets a URL of the video file to play.
Returns the URL of the video file. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the player looping status. @SINCE_1_1.38.

parameterdescription.para: The new looping status: true or false

briefdescription.para: Returns the player looping status. @SINCE_1_1.38.

simplesect.para: True if player is looping, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Starts the video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Pauses the video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Stops the video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the player mute status. @SINCE_1_1.38.

parameterdescription.para: The new mute status, true is mute.

briefdescription.para: Returns the player mute status. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the player volume. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Gets current volume factor. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets video rendering target. @SINCE_1_1.38.

parameterdescription.para: The target for video rendering, window surface or native image

briefdescription.para: Sets the position for playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Returns the current position in milliseconds. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the area of video display. @SINCE_1_2.46 param[in] area The left-top position and size of the video display area.
Sets video display rotation @SINCE_1_1.38.
Returns rotation of current video display @SINCE_1_1.38.
Connect to this signal to be notified when a video playback have finished.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.38
A signal object to connect with.

briefdescription.para: Connect to this signal to be notified when a video playback have evented.

simplesect.para: A signal object to connect with.

briefdescription.para: Seeks forward by the specified number of milliseconds.
Seeks backward by the specified number of milliseconds.
Checks whether the video texture is supported.
Sets codec type.
Gets codec type.
Sets the display mode for playback.
Returns the current display mode.

simplesect.para: The current display mode of playback

briefdescription.para: Returns the current internal media player.

simplesect.para: The current internal media player of video player

briefdescription.para: calls synchronization function in window system This function is called, the synchronization is started between UI(transparent hole) and video player.
calls desynchronization function in window system This function is called, the synchronization is finished between UI(transparent hole) and video player.
Raise the video player above the target video plaer.
Lower the video player to below the target video player.
Raise video player above all other sibling video players.
Lower video player to the bottom of all other sibling video players.
Gets Video Player's native surface.

simplesect.para: The return of native surface pointer of video player

briefdescription.para: Video View has video player is connected to Window's Scene.
Video View has video player is disconnected to Window's Scene.
Sets auto rotation feature. If enabled, video will rotate automatically according to the video orientation.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to enable auto rotation feature. Default value is false.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether auto rotation feature is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if auto rotation feature is enabled, otherwise false. Default value is false.

briefdescription.para: Sets letter box feature. If enabled, the video will play in the video player's aspect ratio.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to enable letter box feature. Default value is false.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether letter box feature is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if letter box feature is enabled, otherwise false. Default value is false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the frame interpolation interval for smooth video playback.

detaileddescription.para: This method sets the target duration for frame interpolation in seconds. The video player will use this interval to smoothly interpolate between video frames.

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables offscreen frame rendering for video interpolation.

detaileddescription.para: This method enables offscreen frame rendering which allows for smooth frame interpolation between previous and current video frames. When enabled, it creates two native images for storing previous and current frames respectively.

@SINCE_2_4.39
useOffScreenFrame
True to enable offscreen frame rendering, false to disable
previousFrameBufferNativeImagePtr
Native image for previous frame buffer
currentFrameBufferNativeImagePtr
Native image for current frame buffer

briefdescription.para: Sets the video frame buffer for rendering.

detaileddescription.para: This method updates the video frame buffer with new video frame data. The source should contain the video frame surface (e.g., tbm_surface) for rendering.

briefdescription.para: VideoPlayerPlugin is an abstract interface, used by dali-adaptor to access video player plugin. A concrete implementation must be created for each platform and provided as dynamic library. @SINCE_1_1.38.
